_description: Liability Ledger trades (ADR-0003), externalized from actions.gd get_financing_options() (L9, #621). execute_action applies the immediate benefit and adds the future bill via Ledger factories; magnitudes live on the Balance surface ('ledger.*'). Dictionary key order matches the pre-L9 literals.

actions.name: Take Loan
actions.description: +$50k now; a balloon repayment (~$60k) bills in 4 turns and compounds until paid.

actions.name: Funding (Strings)
actions.description: +$40k now; a governance obligation bills in 6 turns.

actions.name: Desperation Lever
actions.description: Suppress doom now; plants a SECRET, compounding governance liability that rivals can expose.

actions.name: Contractor
actions.description: +2 action points now; a small governance rider bills later.
